args:
Act as the mandatory independent Guild G-lane round-1 reviewer. Read
`.guild/runs/run-8c2926bb-2ebe-4166-8b77-84c0de3e12c0/review/G-lane:T5-terminal-ui/packet-1.md`,
the exact current receipt, approved plan/spec/ADRs, prior lane review trails,
and the live T5 source/tests. Reopen current files and run read-only focused
checks where useful. Be skeptical about actual Bubble Tea/Lip Gloss production
use, projection-only authority, input non-leakage, eight-pane semantics,
fail-closed confirmations, dependency integrity, and truthful T6 deferrals.

Return only one valid `review_result.v1` object for the packet id and SHA. No
markdown prose outside the structured result.


When you finish, emit your result as a SINGLE fenced code block and nothing after it:
```review_result.v1
{ ... a valid review_result.v1 object ... }
```
The block MUST validate against the review_result.v1 contract. Do not add prose after it.

launch_mode.reason: host "codex" advertises no launch recipe at or below "read_only"; running with the host's OWN default (no autonomy flags, effective mode is nominal) — will NOT escalate to a higher mode.

receipt.reason: Codex CLI has no native Guild hooks; preflight is wrapper/instruction-file based
Codex CLI maps model params to --model and model_reasoning_effort config
